recommendation.headline: Increase liquidity first, then add gold and broad ETFs
recommendation.summary: TELAJ is not against investing. It wants the household to be harder to destabilize before you push further into risk.
recommendation.growthSleeve: Use a broad ETF basket only

rules: Cash before complexity when reserves are thin
Gold when the model wants defense, not panic
Real estate only when liquidity and stress tests support it
watchouts: Do not buy assets you cannot hold through drawdowns
Do not let one asset dominate the family system
Do not weaken reserves to feel invested
